finding_results.notes: Ina's signed authority now triggers an immediate, logged EMERGENCY RETIRE command on a live payload; an on-call dispatcher responds in-scene with active route consequences and confirms the reroute.

The harm table now includes identifiable individuals tied to explicit route/payload markers with concrete bodily injury and household economic fallout, and Ina cites one case directly in confrontation.
The chapter exit now carries embodied stress (blood from cheek bite) and immediate tactical follow-through (reroute confirmation forwarded and next-hour log pull initiated).
Kwon's persuasion moved from repeated slogan-like abstractions to character-specific operational detail: named road/route effects, broker behavior, remittance impact, and concrete injury context.

summary: All packet findings were resolved by tightening chapter causality, replacing sanitized consequence language with route-linked case specificity, and converting the ending into an immediate authority action with on-page external response and embodied cost.
